title: Native Gate Implementations: Building Quantum Operations
description: Learn the practical implementation of single-qubit and two-qubit gates in neutral atom systems, including global and local addressing, pulse sequences, and gate optimization strategies.
learningObjectives: Implement single-qubit rotations using microwave and Raman transitions
Design CZ and other two-qubit gates using Rydberg interactions
Understand global vs local gate addressing strategies
Analyze gate error sources and optimization techniques
Compare different native gate sets for neutral atom quantum computing
